name: trivium
description: Spec-driven development pipelines for Claude Code: three roads (/feature, /refactor, /bugfix) with hard human-approval gates, frozen API contracts enabling parallel FE/BE subagents, a shared visual design system, and PRD-traced Playwright acceptance.

plugins.name: trivium
plugins.description: Spec-driven development pipelines: /feature, /refactor, /bugfix (plus /inception to map new projects) with human-approval gates, frozen API contracts, a shared visual design system, and PRD-traced Playwright acceptance.
